description: A polished designed graphic in portrait format. A high-resolution color photograph fills the upper two-thirds: President Donald Trump (left, dark navy suit, red tie, white hair, small US flag lapel pin) stands shoulder-to-shoulder with Chinese leader Xi Jinping (right, dark navy suit, magenta/purple tie) on a gray paved plaza, with traditional Chinese palace/temple architecture (white marble balustrades, tiled-roof pavilions) softly blurred in the background. Both men face the camera with neutral-to-pleased expressions. The lower third fades into a dark navy gradient bar carrying a bold white headline in mixed roman/italic serif: 'President Trump Secures Historic Deals with China, Delivering for American Workers, Farmers and Industry.' At bottom is the engraved White House building logomark and 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark. Clean, official, prestige-poster styling. Propaganda technique: associating the President with a powerful world leader and framing a foreign trip as a victory for American workers/farmers/industry. Target audience: general public, economic-nationalist supporters.
notable_text: President Trump Secures Historic Deals with China, Delivering for American Workers, Farmers and Industry / The WHITE HOUSE
